query:
SELECT id, claim_number, vehicle_registration, status, description, source_document_id 
FROM claims 
WHERE vehicle_registration LIKE '%AEX%' 
   OR vehicle_registration LIKE '%6208%' 
   OR description LIKE '%Isuzu%' 
   OR description LIKE '%D-Max%'
LIMIT 5;
